'''PK7''' was a [[PK-series worker droid/Legends|PK-series worker droid]] stationed on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Gavos]] and was part of the [[New Droids' Rights Movement]], a group of [[Droid/Legends|droids]] that was focused on spreading violent rebellion against [[Species/Legends|organic]] life forms throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

{{Droid-stub}}
